name_en: MCM top-tier replica Tracy Visetos shoulder bag. This small Tracy shoulder bag is made of classic Visetos and features Vachetta leather trim, creating a new slim version of a classic bag. The bag features a signature laurel lock closure, and the interior is lined with soft leather to accommodate the versatility of modern life.
name_cn:
MCM top-tier replica Tracy Visetos shoulder bag. This small Tracy shoulder bag is made of classic Visetos and features Vachetta leather trim, creating a new slim version of a classic bag. The bag features a signature laurel lock closure, and the interior is lined with soft leather to accommodate the versatility of modern life.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: Cognac, Black
Dimensions: 5.5 x 22.0 x 15.5 cm
